markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 4
### Chapter 69. Jefferson & Orange Cnty. Pilots Licensing and Regul. Act
##### § 69.024 — Depository Bank; Expenditure of Funds

The board shall deposit all money received by the board under this chapter, including assessments and grants from governmental agencies, in a bank located in Jefferson or Orange County and selected by the board.

*Added by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., ch. 745, Sec. 1, eff. June 20, 2003.*

subsections.text: The board shall deposit all money received by the board under this chapter, including assessments and grants from governmental agencies, in a bank located in Jefferson or Orange County and selected by the board.
